---
title: footnote and fig-cap with reference-location margin in PDF (#13588)
format: pdf
reference-location: margin
_quarto:
  tests:
    pdf: null
    latex:
      ensureFileRegexMatches:
        - ['This is a footnote']
        - []
---

A footnote[^1] and a figure.

[^1]: This is a footnote.

```{r}
#| fig-cap: Some figure

plot(1:10, 1:10)
```
